question: Ms. Durkin asked for volunteers to help _______
explanation: "her" is the correct possessive/object pronoun to use after "help". "Asked for volunteers to help her" requires an object pronoun.

question: Lasner Electronics' staff have extensive _______
explanation: "knowledge" is the noun form needed after "extensive" (adjective). "Extensive knowledge of" is a common collocation.

question: ------- a year, Tarrin Industrial Supply audits the accounts of all of its factories.
explanation: "Once a year" is an adverb phrase of frequency meaning one time per year.

question: Ms. Pham requested a refund ------- the coffeemaker she received was damaged. Information ------- the artwork in the lobby is available at the reception desk.
explanation: "because" introduces a reason clause explaining why Ms. Pham requested a refund.

question: With the Gema XTI binoculars, users can _______ meters away.
explanation: "easily" is an adverb modifying the verb "see". We need an adverb, not an adjective.

question: The Physical Therapy Association is committed to keeping costs ------- for its certification programs.
explanation: "affordable" means reasonably priced, which fits the context of keeping costs low for certification programs.

question: Mr. Brennel ------- positions in various areas of the company before he became president.
explanation: "occupied" is the past tense verb needed. Mr. Brennel occupied (held) positions before becoming president.

question: The judges for this year's screenplay competition include ------- from Hanovi Studios.
explanation: "representatives" is the noun form meaning people who represent Hanovi Studios.

question: I have attached my resume detailing my _______
explanation: "extensive" means broad and thorough, which naturally collocates with "experience".

question: Remember to check the spelling of Mr. Kamashi's name when ------- the document.
explanation: "revising" is the gerund form used after "when" as a reduced adverbial clause (when you are revising).

question: Residents visited City Hall to ask ------- developers will preserve the historic properties.
explanation: "whether" introduces an indirect question about uncertainty - will developers preserve the properties or not.

question: The Ford Group's proposed advertising campaign is by far the most ------- we have seen so far.
explanation: "innovative" is the adjective form needed to modify the implied noun (campaign). "Most innovative" is the superlative.

question: Solei Landscaping announced that the design for the Cherry Hill building complex is ------- complete.
explanation: "almost" means nearly, modifying "complete". The design is nearly finished.

question: Daniel Nishida, the chief supply officer, asked that ------- be given full responsibility for approving all invoices.
explanation: "he" is the subject pronoun needed as the subject of the clause "be given full responsibility".

question: Ms. Delgado would like to meet with all loan officers ------- reviewing any more loan applications.
explanation: "before" indicates a time sequence - Ms. Delgado wants to meet before reviewing more applications.

question: Cedar Branch Hill has a ------- as a business-friendly environment that provides efficient licensing and other legal processes.
explanation: "reputation" means the general opinion about something. "Has a reputation as" is a standard expression.

question: The actors held an additional rehearsal _______ scene.
explanation: "in order to" expresses purpose - they held a rehearsal for the purpose of perfecting their performance.

question: RZT Technology will double the size of its Toronto laboratory to -------the organization's rapid growth.
explanation: "accommodate" means to provide space for or to adapt to. The lab is being doubled to accommodate growth.

question: Even though Smithton Electronics' second quarter was not -------, the company plans to invest large sums on research.
explanation: "profitable" is the adjective form needed after "was not". The quarter was not profitable.

question: The Williamsport Hotel is an ideal venue for the conference because of its ------- to the airport.
explanation: "proximity" means nearness. "Proximity to the airport" means it is close to the airport.

question: The second training session is for employees ------- responsibilities include processing payroll forms.
explanation: "whose" is the possessive relative pronoun modifying "responsibilities". Employees whose responsibilities include...

question: ------- poorly the high-speed printer may be functioning, it is still making copies that are adequate for our purposes.
explanation: "However" is used in the pattern "However + adjective/adverb + subject + verb" to mean "no matter how".

question: The long-awaited Weka 2XG digital camera will finally be ------- at a product exhibition on August 16.
explanation: "unveiled" means revealed or shown publicly for the first time. A product exhibition is where new products are unveiled.

question: Northeast Community Finance ------- an online system in order to shorten service lines at branch locations.
explanation: "has implemented" is the present perfect tense showing a completed action with present relevance.

question: York Development Corporation marked the _______ a ribbon-cutting ceremony.
explanation: "opening" is the gerund/noun form. "The opening of" refers to the inauguration ceremony.

question: Staff at the Bismarck Hotel were ------- helpful to us during our stay.
explanation: "quite" is an adverb that modifies "helpful", meaning "very" or "considerably".

question: Ms. Luo will explain some possible consequences of the ------- merger with the Wilson-Peek Corporation.
explanation: "proposed" is the past participle used as an adjective, meaning "suggested" or "put forward for consideration".

question: The Springdale supermarket survey ------- will be released a week after they are evaluated.
explanation: "results" is the logical noun. Survey results are what get released after evaluation.

question: The new printer operates more ------- than the previous model did.
explanation: "quickly" is the adverb form needed to modify "operates". Comparative form: "more quickly than".

question: Here at Vanguard Buying Club, ------- help members find quality merchandise at the lowest possible prices.
explanation: "we" is the subject pronoun needed as the subject of the verb "help".

question: Management announced that all salespeople would be receiving a bonus this year, ------- in time for summer vacations.
explanation: "just in time" is a fixed expression meaning exactly at the right moment.

question: According to Florida Digital Designer Magazine, many graphic designers do not consider ------- to be traditional artists.
explanation: "themselves" is the reflexive pronoun referring back to "designers". They do not consider themselves to be artists.

question: Ms. Tillinghast has received several awards _______
explanation: "for" is the preposition used with "awards". "Received awards for" her ideas.

question: Using proper techniques to------- items drastically reduces the risk of back injury.
explanation: "lift" is the correct verb meaning to raise items. Proper techniques to lift items reduces back injury risk.

question: Restaurants in Rondale must follow all _______
explanation: "local" is the adjective form needed to modify "health guidelines".

question: Sinee's Catering is always ------- to deliver outstanding food to your special events.
explanation: "ready" fits the pattern "ready to deliver". Always ready to deliver outstanding food.

question: A ------- way to support economic growth in Ludlow City is to shop at area businesses.
explanation: "practical" is the adjective form needed to modify "way". A practical way to support growth.

question: A record number of appliance------- came into the Port of Reece last month.
explanation: "shipments" is the plural noun. A record number of shipments came into the port.

question: At Sloat Publishing, interns are assigned to a ------- of positions with increasing responsibility.
explanation: "series" means a number of similar things. "A series of positions" is a common collocation.

question: The conference fee ------- admittance to more than twenty workshops and seminars.
explanation: "includes" is the third-person singular verb agreeing with the subject "fee" (singular).

question: Jesper Associates currently has ------- with 26 different food suppliers.
explanation: "contracts" is the plural noun. "Has contracts with" means has agreements with suppliers.

question: Passengers must be at the gate ------- 25 minutes prior to boarding their flight.
explanation: "at least" means a minimum of. Passengers must be there at least 25 minutes before boarding.

question: Deltran analytics software can help ------- identify issues, predict trends, and improve business.
explanation: "you" is the object pronoun after "help". The software can help you identify issues.

question: The technology department ------- to purchase three new servers next year.
explanation: "plans" is the correct verb. "Plans to purchase" means intends to buy.

question: Jennson Motors hired an ------- new efficiency expert last month.
explanation: "exceptional" means outstanding or unusually good, fitting the context of hiring an expert.

question: Mr. Winkel's ------- responsibilities include auditing and financial review of large clients.
explanation: "accounting" is the gerund/adjective form. "Accounting responsibilities" means duties related to accounting.

question: The prime minister greeted foreign diplomats ------- a luncheon today in London.
explanation: "at" is the preposition used with events/gatherings. "At a luncheon" indicates location/event.

question: The management team at Otto Corporation offers incentives ------- employee productivity.
explanation: "to stimulate" is the infinitive of purpose. Incentives to stimulate productivity.

question: \------- construction in progress at the old town hall building, tourist groups will not be allowed to enter the site.
explanation: "Due to" means because of. Due to construction in progress, tourists cannot enter.

question: Several drilling-technology experts will present the results of their ------- on June
explanation: "investigation" means research or study. Experts presenting results of their investigation.

question: The store had a------- display to promote the newest book from the best-selling mystery author.
explanation: "massive" means very large. A massive display to promote the book.

question: Most of the people ------- attended yesterday's workshop have already submitted their feedback.
explanation: "who" is the subject relative pronoun for people. People who attended the workshop.

question: Both tasty and healthy, the tomato salad at Alfredi's Bistro is also large ------- to be served as a main dish.
explanation: "enough" follows an adjective. "Large enough to be served" means sufficiently large.

question: The Klassin Group's booth at the Liberty Architecture Expo has garnered much -------.
explanation: "interest" is the uncountable noun. "Much interest" - garnered much interest/attention.

question: Save 25 percent on any printer ------- you buy a laptop computer at Diego's Electronics.
explanation: "whenever" means any time that. Save 25% whenever you buy a laptop.

question: The recently adopted policy restructures the company's debt according to a ------- five-step plan.
explanation: "manageable" is the adjective form modifying "plan". A manageable five-step plan.

question: The quality assurance department needs to hire additional staff ------- production has increased by 50 percent.
explanation: "since" introduces a reason clause (because). Since production increased, more staff is needed.

question: Your order cannot ------- until we have received full payment.
explanation: "be processed" is the passive infinitive after "cannot". Orders are processed (passive voice).

question: The annual report has been posted online, _______ received a printed copy.
explanation: "but" is a coordinating conjunction showing contrast between two independent clauses.

question: Hasin Fariz turned a study on the ------- effects of sleep into a best-selling book.
explanation: "favorable" is the adjective form modifying "effects". The favorable effects of sleep.

question: Wynston Containers is ------- a yearly shutdown of its factory so that it can be evaluated for safety and efficiency.
explanation: "implementing" means putting into action. The company is implementing a yearly shutdown.

question: The Girard Botanical Archive has almost 300,000 plant -------, all neatly pressed onto archival paper.
explanation: "specimens" are samples or examples. A botanical archive has plant specimens.

question: Hotels and universities are ------- to recycle their used mattresses through the city's recycling program.
explanation: "eligible" means qualified or entitled. "Eligible to recycle" through the program.

question: The ------- to review plans to replace the Tronton Bridge will be scheduled soon.
explanation: "hearing" is a noun meaning a formal meeting to review plans. "The hearing to review plans."

question: Kovox Ltd. aims to optimize quality ------- reducing the impact on the environment.
explanation: "while" means at the same time as. Optimizing quality while reducing environmental impact.

question: The grocery store ------- vegetables from out of town until local prices went down last month.
explanation: "had been buying" is the past perfect continuous, indicating an action that started before and continued up to another past event.

question: All Hershel Industries employees must have a valid ID card ------- enter the building.
explanation: "in order to" expresses purpose. Must have ID in order to enter the building.

question: \------- and cost factored equally in choosing Cantavox as our main supplier.
explanation: "Reliability" means dependability/trustworthiness. Reliability and cost were factors in choosing a supplier.

question: Ms. Villanueva has extensive experience in corporate ------- and budgeting.
explanation: "finance" is the noun form. "Corporate finance and budgeting" are related business fields.

question: Because Mr. Lewis works so -------, he was given a pay raise.
explanation: "hard" is an adverb meaning with great effort. "Works so hard" is a common expression.

question: Full of old-fashioned charm, the Bronstad Inn ------- offers modern conveniences.
explanation: "also" means in addition. The inn also offers modern conveniences.

question: Franklin Bookstore will be moving next month ------- a larger location on Queen Street. (C ) out
explanation: "to" is the preposition indicating direction/destination. Moving to a larger location.

question: Marina Hou ------- considered becoming an actor before deciding to write plays instead.
explanation: "briefly" is the adverb modifying "considered". She briefly considered becoming an actor.

question: On Fixit Time's Web site, homeowners will find economical solutions for ------- repairs.
explanation: "common" means frequent or usual. Common repairs are typical repairs homeowners need.

question: Walter Keegan was ------- hired as a salesperson, but he soon became head of the marketing department.
explanation: "originally" is the adverb form. He was originally hired as a salesperson. (Note: the option shows "originall" which is likely "originally")

question: Durr Island has become popular with tourists ------- its rich culture of art and music.
explanation: "because of" gives a reason. Popular because of its rich culture.

question: While he is not enthusiastic about the suggestions, Mr. Shang ------- them.
explanation: "will consider" is the future simple tense. Mr. Shang will consider the suggestions.

question: The design ------- of Tavalyo Toys has been relocated to the company's headquarters.
explanation: "division" means a department or section. "The design division" of the company.

question: The Merrick Travel Agency organizes tours of national monuments and other ------- sites in the St. Petersburg area.
explanation: "historic" is the adjective form modifying "sites". Historic sites are places of historical significance.

question: The MHS wireless speaker not only works with smartphones ------- is waterproof as well.
explanation: "but" is used in the correlative conjunction pattern "not only... but (also)".

question: Assistant managers are largely responsible for the day-to-day operations in ------- departments.
explanation: "their" is the possessive adjective modifying "departments". Their departments.

question: Customers must ------- review the terms of the fitness center's membership agreement before they sign it.
explanation: "thoroughly" means completely and carefully. Must thoroughly review the terms.

question: We made a ------- estimate of how many tourists to expect in the coming month.
explanation: "conservative" is the adjective form modifying "estimate". A conservative estimate is cautiously low.

question: Once they have completed three years of employment, the workers at Loruja ------- additional vacation time.
explanation: "earn" means to gain through effort. Workers earn additional vacation time after 3 years.

question: \------- has time at the end of the day should make sure that all of the file cabinets are locked.
explanation: "Whoever" means any person who. Whoever has time should lock the cabinets.

question: North River Linens promises next-day shipping ------- Asia.
explanation: "throughout" means in every part of. Shipping throughout Asia means to all parts of Asia.

question: \------- last year, the unpublished novel by Martin Sim has attracted intense interest from several publishing companies.
explanation: "Discovered" is a past participle used in a participial phrase. "Discovered last year, the novel has attracted interest."

question: Hoonton Realty clients can search property listings in ------- neighborhood by using a special online database.
explanation: "any" is used with singular nouns to mean "every" or "whichever". Search in any neighborhood.

question: Exceptional service is what sets our hotels apart from those of our -------.
explanation: "competition" is the noun form meaning competitors collectively. Sets us apart from our competition.

question: The Internet connection will be closely monitored ------- the source of the slowdown can be confirmed.
explanation: "until" means up to the point that. Monitored until the source can be confirmed.

question: Thank you for being one of Danton Transportation's most ------- customers over the past ten years.
explanation: "valued" is the past participle/adjective meaning highly regarded. Most valued customers.

question: Mr. Tang is a successful recruiter because he can quickly ------- talented sales agents from the rest.
explanation: "distinguish" means to tell apart. He can distinguish talented agents from the rest.

question: Ms. Penner assured us that------- work stopped during the power failure, production targets would be met.
explanation: "although" is a concession conjunction. Although work stopped, targets would still be met.

question: Please provide the exact dimensions of the custom fence you would like built, and your quote will be adjusted -------.
explanation: "accordingly" means in accordance with the information provided. Quote adjusted accordingly.

question: The vice president of Chestonville Bank believes that ------- employees is vital to the company's success.
explanation: "empowering" is the gerund used as the subject. Empowering employees is vital to success.

question: The------- for the city council's Monday meeting is posted on the municipal Web site by 3:00P.M. on the preceding Friday.
explanation: "agenda" is the list of items to be discussed at a meeting. Meeting agenda.

question: The building inspector declared the new facility ------- sound and ready to open.
explanation: "structurally" is the adverb modifying "sound". Structurally sound means the structure is solid.

question: Dr. Huertas received the ------- Brighton Award for her groundbreaking work in plant biology.
explanation: "prestigious" means highly respected and admired. A prestigious award.

question: Every batch of sauce at Generita's Bistro is processed meticulously by ------- expert chefs.
explanation: "their" is the possessive adjective. Processed by their expert chefs.

question: Computerization of medical records ------- increases a physician's ability to diagnose and treat patients.
explanation: "greatly" is the adverb modifying "increases". Computerization greatly increases ability.

question: At Rojelle's Fine Dining, we use the freshest _______
explanation: "ingredients" are components used in cooking. Freshest ingredients for salads.

question: Professor Benguigui will present his paper _______ tomorrow.
explanation: "at" is the preposition used with conferences/events. Present at the conference.

question: The chefs are still waiting for a ------- date for the new convection oven that was ordered two weeks ago.
explanation: "shipping" is the gerund used as an adjective. A shipping date is the date of delivery.

question: Mr. Kang works ------- with our internal team members as well as various regional sales representatives.
explanation: "closely" means in a close manner. Works closely with team members means collaborates directly.

question: Fashion designer Hye-Ja Pak knows ------- to update her line in response to changing tastes.
explanation: "when" introduces a time clause. She knows when to update her line.

question: The samba class was so well ------- that the Yulara Dance School decided to make the course a permanent offering.
explanation: "attended" means people came to the class. Well attended means many people participated.

question: The factory will be situated away ------- the city's residential area to reduce complaints about noise and emissions.
explanation: "from" is used in the phrase "away from". Situated away from the residential area.

question: Ms. Kuramoto selected the most ------- mailing option available.
explanation: "economical" is the adjective meaning cost-effective. The most economical mailing option.

question: Companies without information technology specialists can ------- on Vyber Software Advisers for assistance with online services.
explanation: "rely" is the base verb form after "can". Can rely on Vyber for assistance.

question: Next year, our team will have a new task, _______
explanation: "which" is a relative pronoun referring to "task". A new task, which is to review portfolios.

question: Cook the meat for 30 minutes to ensure _______
explanation: "its" is the possessive pronoun for "meat" (singular, neuter). Ensure its readiness.

question: Amoxitron's research team will hire ------- interns to assist with laboratory duties.
explanation: "several" means more than two but not very many. Hire several interns.

question: \------- the new acai juice blend has proved so popular, we should move quickly to increase our production volume.
explanation: "Since" means because. Since the juice is popular, we should increase production.

question: New emissions standards have forced Rider Auto to modify the process of engine -------.
explanation: "construction" is the noun form. Engine construction = the process of building engines.

question: Maki Kayano's book offers techniques for _______ precision.
explanation: "executing" means carrying out or performing. Executing business tasks with speed.

question: To control costs, updated credit card readers will be installed in branch stores -------.
explanation: "gradually" is the adverb modifying "installed". Installed gradually to control costs.

question: In this quarter, the Mantel Beverage Company is expecting sales ------- £160,000 and £180,000.
explanation: "between" is used with two values. Sales between £160,000 and £180,000.

question: Because Mount Akoyola is so challenging for climbers, ------- have reached its peak.
explanation: "few" means not many. Few climbers have reached the peak because it is challenging.

question: Please contact the product distributor, not the retail store, if------- need replacement parts.
explanation: "you" is the subject pronoun. If you need replacement parts.

question: AGU Group's insurance rates have remained steady ------- the last three years.
explanation: "for" is used with time periods. "For the last three years" indicates duration.

question: Sage Bistro's menu features a ------c variety of seafood items than Almaner Pavilion's.
explanation: "wider" is the comparative form. "A wider variety than" compares two restaurants.

question: Frequent training enables our technicians to resolve most computer problems -------.
explanation: "swiftly" means quickly and efficiently. Resolve problems swiftly.

question: Most of the manufacturing sector has reported higher profits as a result of the trade -------.
explanation: "agreement" is the noun form. "Trade agreement" is a standard term for a commerce pact.

question: The cooking instructions call for reducing the heat and letting the sauce simmer ------- it thickens.
explanation: "until" means up to the point when. Let it simmer until it thickens.

question: The Cullingford Bridge took a ------- short amount of time to be repaired.
explanation: "surprisingly" is the adverb modifying "short". A surprisingly short amount of time.

question: The company's summer picnic is ------- held outside town, in Warren County Lakeside Park.
explanation: "always" is an adverb of frequency. The picnic is always held outside town.

question: Students are expected to ______ their classes regularly.

question: As soon as the children were _____ , their mother got them out of bed and into the bathroom.

question: This ____ is not big enough to cut down a tree.

question: In the market, the merchants _______ and joked with their friends and neighbours.

question: Through a mixture of greed and intelligence, he has ______ the biggest landowner in the whole district.

question: The children will not be allowed to come with us if they don’t _______ themselves better.
